step_rationale: Master endothelial transcription factor; elevated in STEMI platelets and post-MI immunity.
mechanism: ETS transcription factor regulates endothelial phenotype and is dysregulated in STEMI, also involved in platelet immunoglobulin responses.

references.title: Single-cell 'omic profiles of human aortic endothelial cells in vitro and human atherosclerotic lesions ex vivo reveal heterogeneity of endothelial subtype and response to activating perturbations.

Persistent transcriptional changes in cardiac adaptive immune cells following myocardial infarction: New evidence from the re-analysis of publicly available single cell and nuclei RNA-sequencing data sets.
references.journal: Journal of molecular and cellular cardiology

references.title: Characterization of the platelet transcriptome by RNA sequencing in patients with acute myocardial infarction.
